title: Board privacy feature where members/guest can only view items assigned to them

posts.cookedHtml: Board privacy feature where members/guest can only view items assigned to them

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MichBedeo !

This is a feature if you update your account to Enterprise. If you look in your board permissions it clarifies what the setting would do if you were to upgrade.

Board Permissions1920×1300 86.7 KB

Hope this helps!
